title: ICN Additions
description: This is a datapack created to house all crafting recipe modifications in the ICN Modpack I created.
body:
This datapack adds and changes new recipes designed for my ICN modpack, for a nation roleplay server. Mods affected include Ballistix, Immersive Engineering, Mekanism, Mekanism Generators, Create: Numismatics, and soon to be more!

Main pack: https://modrinth.com/modpack/international-coalition-of-nations
